General.Name: Suncorp Technologies Ltd
General.Description: Suncorp Technologies Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the processing and trading of used computer-related components in the People's Republic of China, Indonesia, the United States, Singapore, the United Arab Emirates, Sri Lanka, and internationally. It also sells clothes and beauty product; and offers securities brokerage, placing, and underwriting services, as well as money lending services. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
